About

Postgraduate student in Geoinformatics at IIT Kanpur, currently researching the DORIS (Doppler Orbitography and Radiopositioning Integrated by Satellite) system — working on precise orbit determination, orbit modelling, Earth rotation parameters, terrestrial reference frames, and geodetic data analysis. Interested in how satellite orbit dynamics, gravity field models, and non-conservative forces affect positioning accuracy and global geodetic products. Also experienced in LiDAR data processing, GIS, remote sensing, coordinate reference systems, and geospatial data quality assessment, with a broader interest in automation and scientific computing for geospatial workflows.

Areas of focus

Satellite geodesy

  • DORIS & precise orbit determination
  • Earth rotation parameters
  • Terrestrial reference frames
  • Gravity field & non-conservative forces

Geospatial & GIS

Projects

India's First DORIS Beacon — IIT Kanpur

IIT Kanpur installed India's first DORIS beacon, joining the global DORIS network used for centimetre-level satellite tracking and precise orbit determination. The station carries an antenna, amplifier box, beacon box, Iridium modem, GPS sensor, and meteorological sensors, and contributes to space geodesy, climate monitoring, and disaster-management capabilities. This is the system I am currently working with for my DORIS research.

DORISSatellite GeodesyIIT Kanpur

Digitized Mess Management System

A VBA/Excel-based system built to digitize hostel mess (dining) operations. Includes a menu table with day-wise items and date validity, dropdown-driven meal entry for breakfast/lunch/dinner, automatic price lookup and per-entry total calculation, a "live items" running-timer mode for real-time orders, QR-code-based entry via a scan buffer cell, and history/undo-redo logging. Admin controls cover sheet protection and locking, password-gated admin unlock, and automated re-locking after a timeout.

VBAExcelAutomation
